Keywords: Attunement, Inner Echo, Receiving, Subtle Truths, Hum Beneath Noise
Upright Meaning: A call to listen deeply—not just with ears, but with your entire awareness. Wisdom lies in the spaces between words. Pause and receive.
Reversed Meaning: Disconnection or overwhelm. You may be missing subtle cues or avoiding your inner whisper. Return to quiet and ask what needs to be heard.
Ritual Cue: Close your eyes, place a hand over your chest or solar plexus, breathe until your edges soften. Ask: What wants to be heard today?
Tarot Kin: Temperance – sacred pause before inner alchemy.
